goal: Ship v8.9 External Runtime Outcome Evidence and Learning Loop.
risk: AOF could treat approval, reproduction, or rollback readiness as final external runtime value without recording observed outcome or learning update.
loss_boundary: No v8.9 release claim unless provider outcome evidence audit and provider learning-loop audit pass and not-proven boundaries remain explicit.
acceptance_gates: focused negative test rejects missing linked outcome
evidence_plan: schemas, commands, parser support, focused tests, self-hosting proof artifacts, Council review, release-state audit
stop_conditions: stop if outcome evidence is missing
stop if learning-loop update is missing
stop if production execution is implied
